title: Character Sets
text: Character Sets Uniface applications can run on many platforms and operating systems, each with their own input and output devices, and their own character sets. Internally, Uniface has its own function codes to define appearance and behavior, and it uses Unicode as its internal character set. To handle translation between the external character set and Uniface's internal character set, Uniface uses meta character sets which are mapped to Unicode characters, and a meta variant, which is an internal character set that is mapped to one or more external character sets.
